label: Orc Warpaths
note: Per-enemy spawn-placement (docs/RAIL-COMMAND.md §enemy placement): each rank opens another warpath the forest-orc can muster from — up to N+1 of the map's gates (mouth → flank → lane → rear), spreading the orcs across more board slices AND paying +25% coins per orc felled (a wider front is a richer one). The placement track is the coin flywheel's depth dial.
